opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I step down, it feels like I'm walking on a sharp needle. I can't even get to the kitchen. I think I've got a really bad corn on the bottom of my foot.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain in the sole of my foot has got so bad in the last day that I can barely walk — I'm hopping around holding onto the furniture.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on gradually over a while, but got much worse in the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: the lump has been there a while and slowly getting bigger; the bad pain is the last day or so
symptom_narrative.character: a firm, hard, rough lump on the bottom of my foot; standing on it feels like a sharp stabbing needle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so painful I can't put my weight on it properly
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the sole of my right foot, on the ball behind the toes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: hurts whenever I stand on it or walk
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping my weight off it; a corn plaster I bought barely helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing on it, walking, and especially squeezing or pinching the sides of the lump
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: none really — just the sore lump and not being able to walk on it
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can only hop or hold onto furniture to get around; I'm worried about falling because I live on my own

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; swims regularly and uses the communal showers at a public pool

objective_data_offered.value: no fever, I don't feel hot or unwell in myself
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective impression, no thermometer reading offered

objective_data_offered.value: a small firm, rough, raised area of hard skin on the ball of the right foot, roughly the size of a pea; no obvious redness spreading around it and nothing weeping or oozing that I can see
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held camera, plantar surface hard to light and angle well
